titleStmt.title: SII 9.440: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 440. (A.R. No. 283 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ANJANEYASVAMI TEMPLE AT RAJABAVANAHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1341, Vikāri, Kārtika, śu. 11, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1419 October 29 Sunday, in the reign of Dēvarāya- Mahārāya. It records that, while Hariyaṇṇa, son of Lakhappa, was ruling the division of Noṇabana-Arasiyakeṟe in Pāṇḍya-nāḍu under the orders of the king, the Mahājanas headed by this Hariyaṇṇa were granted as a śrōtriya-agrahāra the village of Hariyasamudra for having founded it by reclaiming the forests, and having constructed a tank. The land under the new tank was made free from taxes such as tax on wet land, dry land, arecanut, coconut, jack-fruit, mango-trees, sugar-cane, plantain-trees, betel creepers, salt-pan, harvest-grain, ploughs of bullocks and buffaloes, sēse, siddhāya, Daṇāyaka-sāmya and other imposts. It also records that the Mahājanas granted rent-free lands to other Brāhmans (named).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ śrīgurubhyō namaḥ
mastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1341 saṁdu varttamā
na vikārisaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 11 Ādivāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyarū śrīpaṁpāvirūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalu
vijayanagariya nelevīḍinalu sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ sakaḷarājyava danu pratipā
lisuttamirdalli Ādēvarāyamahārāyara nirūpadiṁ lakhappagaḷa makkaḷu hariyaṁṇaga
ḷu pāṁḍyanāḍa noṇabanaArasiyakeṟeya vaḷitavanu Āḷutta(ṁ)middalli rukkuśākheya pū
gōtrada Ā lakhappagaḷa makkaḷu hariyaṁṇagaḷu rukkuśākheya Ātrēyagōtrada cada bonmmarasara
makkaḷu bācappagaḷu rukuśākheya vasiṣṭagōtrada viṭhappagaḷa makkaḷu siṁgaṁṇagaḷu rukuśākheya vasiṣṭa
gōtrada nāgaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu rāyaṁṇagaḷu rukuśākheya Ātrēyagōtrada bācappagaḷa makkaḷu lakṣmīdharadēva
gaḷu muṁtāda mahājanaṁgaḷige sūryyōparāgapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu koṭṭa śrōtriyaAgrahāradānaśilāśāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdare namma Arasiyakeṟeyiṁda mūḍalu nela modalāgi Ara(ṁ)ṇyavāgi yida bhūmiyanū
nīvu muṁtāda mahājanaṁgaḷū kaṁḍu �yo bhūmiya voḷage nāvu sāvirasaṁkheya hoṁnanu keṟe
ya kaṭṭisi hariyasamudraveṁba nāmadalu Ā puravanu māḍireṁdu nimage hēḷida nāu Ā grāmavanu māḍuvada
kke koḍisidavaru sīmeya vivara mūḍalu koṁcanahaḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu pagareOttina
hōda mūḍalu teṁkalu rājagoṁḍanahaḷḷiya guḍada Ottinalu Upanidigaḷu hāki naṭṭiha vāmanamudreya
ka nidu niluva nāḷahaḷa mēreyāgi koṭṭūra teṁkaṇa bhāgadalu Upanidigaḷu hāki naṭṭiha vāmanamudre
kalliṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu koṭūra dāriya guḍḍada huṭaṟeya mēle hōda vāmanamudreya saritadalu Upanidigaḷu hākida vā
mudreya kallugaḷiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kaḍabageṟeya sīmeyalu Upanidigaḷu vāmanamudreya kalu manabeṁceya Aḍa
vāmanamudreya sāsaveyahaḷḷiya sīmeyalu Upanidigaḷu hāki naṭṭa vāmanamudreya kallu koṁbanahāḷa mū
ḍa sīmeya teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Āṣṭa
bhōgatējasvā(ṁ)mya Ā keṟeya keḷage gadde beddalu Āḍakeyamara teṁginamara halasu �vūu kabu bāḷe yeleyabaḷḷi Ā
la Arasina kuṁmari kāḍāraṁbha suvarnādāya vāra kāru sēse siddhāya Uppinamōḷe daṇāyakara sāmya ṇadhānya pa
tuppa nallēru nallemme hoḍake tirupu magga mudre kraya kaḍḍāya hārikāya bāḷuka huṇaseyahaṁṇu
heya hullu Ulupe Uḍugoṟe biṭṭi koṭṭaṇa hālu kūḍu biḍāra Aṁgajāvige mādāṟike Adhikāri
ya Uḍugoṟe sēnabōyike bādinavartane Adhikamāsa muṁtāgi yēnuḷa sarvvasvāmyavanū nīu Āgu
māḍikoṁḍu nīvuThe rest of this line and the beginning of the next were written and then scored
Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi nīvu nimma saṁtānaparaṁpareyāgi bhōgisi bahu
du �yo Ādikrayadānaparivarttanakke saluvaṁtāgi sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi naṁma svaruciyiṁda
Oḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭa śrōtriyadānaśilāśāsana . śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī . bācappagaḷu siṁgaṁṇa gaḷu nāgaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu kācaṁṇagaḷu la
kṣmīdharadēvagaḷu muṁtāda mahājanaṁgaḷu tāu śrītriya hoṁnanū tettu mānyavāgi khaṁḍikavāgi koṭa gaḷu bhāradvājagōtrada
rukuśākheya māyaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu gaṁgaṁṇagaḷige keṟeya keḷagaṇa hiriyahaḷḷadalu kīḷērige biṭṭa sthaḷa Āgāmi saha sāvira
yereyalu gadde bījavari hattukoḷaga baḍagaṇa baṭṭeya kāluveya vusabinalu bījavari gadde hattukoḷaga viśvāmitragōtrada yajuśā
kheya sēṣaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu cavuḍappagaḷige hiriyahaḷḷadalu tōṭasthaḷa Āgāmi saha sāvira yereyalu gadde bījavari hattukoḷaga
Usabinalu bījavari hattukoḷaga gautamagōtrada rukkuśākheya nānappagaḷa makkaḷu Ānaṁtabhaṭṭarige hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi
saha sāvire yere bījavari gade hattukoḷaga Usabu bījavari hattukoḷaga kāśyapagōtrada rukkuśākheya kōṭidēvagaḷa makkaḷu hari
yaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷḷadalu tōṭasthaḷa Āgāmi saha Ayinūṟu teṁkaṇahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha Ayinūṟu yereya
lu gadde bījavari hattukoḷaga vusabinalu bījavari gadde hattu koḷaga mōnabhārgavagōtrada rukkuśākheya kāyaṇṇagaḷa makkaḷu nāgaṁ
ṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa yeraḍu sāvirakeṟeya baḍagaṇakōḍiyiṁ mūḍalu huṇiseya vina
haḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu vusabinakāluveyiṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu tōṭada sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu yī catusīmeya
Oḷage gadeyiṁ baḍaga yeragadeyiṁ keḷege hiriyahaḷḷada tevara Otina koṁḍiyalu gadeya bījavari khaṁḍhu
ga vubhayaṁ gadde mūghaṁḍuga vasiṣṭagōtrada rukkuśākheya maṁgarasara makkaḷu māyadēvagaḷige teṁkaṇa ha
ḷḷada haruhinalu tōṭasthaḷa Āgāmi saha Ayinūṟu hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa Āyinūṟu
Ubhayaṁ sāvira yereyalu gadde bījavari hattukoḷagavusabinalu gadde bījavari hattukūḷaga vasiṣṭagōtrada ruku
śākheya viṭhappagaḷa makkaḷu dēvaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷḷadalu tōṭasthaḷa sāvira yereyalu gaddebījavari hattuko
ḷaga vusabinalu bījavari hattukoḷaga pūti gōtrada rukkuśākheya lakhappagaḷa makkaḷu hiriyaṁṇagaḷige teṁka
ṇahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa sāvira yereyalu gadde bījavari hattu koḷaga vusabinalu gadde bījavari hattukoḷaga
viśvāmitragōtrada yajuśākheya kēśavabhaṭṭara makkaḷu caṁḍibhaṭṭarige teṁkaṇahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭastaḷa sāvira yereyalu gadde
khaṁḍuga vusabinalu bījavari gadde khaṁḍuga Agastyagōtrada rukkuśākheya dēvaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu naraśuṁvabhaṭṭarige teṁkaṇahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha
tōṭasthaḷa sāvira yereyalu bījavari gadde hattukoḷaga vusabinalu bījavari gadde hattu koḷaga kāśyapagōtrada rukuśākheya naraśuṁvadēvara makkaḷu
liṁgaṁṇagaḷige teṁkaṇahaḷadalu tōṭasthaḷa Āgāmi saha Ayinūṟu hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha Ayinūṟu yereyalu gadde ha
ttu koḷaga vusabinalu gadde bījavari Ayiguḷa vaśiṣṭagōtrada rukuśākheya dharaṇībhaṭṭara makkaḷu nāgaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷadalu Āgāmi sa
ha tōṭasthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu gadde bījavari Ayiguḷa vusabinalu bījavari gadde Ayiguḷa mōdgalyagōtrada rukuśākheya dēvaṁṇabha
ṭṭara makkaḷu dēvaṁṇagaḷige teṁkaṇa haḷḷadalu tōṭasthaḷa Āgāmi saha Āyinūṟu Ereyalu gadde bījavari Āyiguḷa vusabinalu bī
javari gadde Ayiguḷa śrīvatsagōtrada śuklayajuśśākheya siṁgāvaḍapara makkaḷu siddappagaḷige hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭa
sthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu gadde bījavari Ayiguḷa vusabinalu bījavari gadde Ayiguḷa kāsyapagōtrada rukkuśākheya maṁgarasara ma
kkaḷu sāvaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu gade bījavari Ayiguḷa vusabinalu gade Ayi
guḷa gautamagōtrada yajuśākheya kūcibhaṭṭara makkaḷu mallijōyisarige hiriyahaḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu
gade bījavari Ayiguḷa vusabinalu gade Ayiguḷa bhāradvājagōtrada rukuśākheya kēśaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu kāvaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷa
dalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu gade bījavari Ayigaḷa vusabinalu gade Ayiguḷa bhāradvājagōtrada rukuśākhe
makaḷu gaṁgaṇabhaṭṭarige hiriyahaḷḷadalu Āgāmi saha tōṭasthaḷa Ayinūṟu yereyalu gade Ayiguḷa bījavari
gōtrada rukkuśākheya kēśaṁṇagaḷa makaḷu kāyaṁṇagaḷige hiriyahaḷadalu Āgāmisa
rukuśākheya
gade Ayigaḷa vusubinalu gade Ayi
nalu gade hadineṁṭu koḷaga �yo dharmake Āru Aḷupi
nāchrēyōnupālanuṁ dānātsvargamavā
rāyōjana maga
śāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.440 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
